_comment: MichiOS control plane. Non-secret, switchable settings governing the brain, boot profile, limits, and tool setup. Secrets (API keys, tokens) live in .env and are referenced here by env-var NAME, never by value. Security (the shell allow/deny gate) lives in policy.json. Profiles: `michi` uses `default`; `michi --config <name>` loads that named profile, falling back to default for any field it omits. Edit by hand, via `michi config` (TUI), or the admin panel.

movicom.comment: device = adb serial to target (e.g. emulator-5554 or an IP:port for wireless). Empty = whatever adb sees first.

cm64.comment: cm64 project id Michi builds against; key env var name lives below

deep.comment: stronger dense model + full boot + more room — for hard, multi-step jobs

cheap.comment: text-only, cheapest brain — for jobs that never need to SEE the screen

heartbeat.comment: short, conservative autonomous check (read notifications, continue tasks)

dev-agency.comment: Michi as a one-person dev agency on CM64 — persona context + build/review skills. Example of composing a persona from the shared library.
